mapper.sql: id, order_no, biz_no, biz_type, app_id, customer_no, platform, service_id, deposit_amount, frozen_amount, actual_amount, status, auth_time, complete_time, expire_time, third_party_order_no, callback_data, ext, remark, notify_url, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ds_service_order ( order_no, biz_no, biz_type, app_id, customer_no, platform, service_id, deposit_amount, frozen_amount, actual_amount, status, auth_time, complete_time, expire_time, third_party_order_no, callback_data, ext, remark, notify_url, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{bizNo}, #{bizType}, #{appId}, #{customerNo}, #{platform}, #{serviceId}, #{depositAmount}, #{frozenAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{status}, #{authTime}, #{completeTime}, #{expireTime}, #{thirdPartyOrderNo}, #{callbackData}, #{ext}, #{remark}, #{notifyUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_service_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM ds_service_order WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ds_service_order WHERE status = #{status} AND expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time < NOW() ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
